markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy for the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prioritize Competitive Content:** New Dream Data platform data shows competitive content (vs. ElevenLabs, AssemblyAI) drives high traffic. The strategy is to create more, using formats like scorecards to avoid giving competitors direct SEO credit.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Launch QSR Content:** A major Quick Service Retail (QSR) business launch is set for Jan 13. The immediate goal is to build a content backlog under the "Deepgram for restaurants" brand.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Focus Next Week's Content:** Next week's articles will target two high-potential topic clusters: "voice API evaluation" (which is already performing well) and "enterprise production deployment" (to test for new traffic signals).](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Cancel Next Sync:** The Dec 23 sync is canceled due to the Dec 29 "Quiet Week." The team will reconvene in the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

## Topics

### New Content Strategy: Competitive & Partner Content

  - [**Driver:** New Dream Data platform data shows competitive content drives high traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Competitors to Target:** ElevenLabs, AssemblyAI, VAPI, Tortoise TTS.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Strategic Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Create more direct comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
      - [Develop formats like "scorecards" to rank features without naming competitors in titles, avoiding giving them direct SEO credit.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Partner Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** High user interest in how Deepgram integrates with developer frameworks (e.g., LiveKit, PipeCat).](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Action:** Expand existing partner pages into full articles detailing integration guides and use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Scope:** Include major platforms like AWS.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

### New Content Strategy: QSR Launch

  - [**Launch:** Quick Service Retail (QSR) business on Jan 13.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build a content backlog under the "Deepgram for restaurants" brand.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide messaging guidance within the next week. Erik's team will begin keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Content & Pipeline Status

  - [**Text-to-Speech (TTS):** 10 topics from Hasan are being aligned with keywords and added to the backlog for a Q1 focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Article Refresher Pipeline:** The engineering team is testing the new pipeline, which will be ready for use in the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard is out of date. Erik's team is manually updating it to include recent URLs for accurate performance data. Update expected by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Language Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting Sanity CLI admin access from Patricia to begin page creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Keyword Research:** Complete. The team will create pages for low-volume languages (e.g., Mandarin, Cantonese) while building out the main pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Wireframes:** Hasan will update wireframes for new TTS languages.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [Approve topics in the Airtable backlog, prioritizing "voice API evaluation" and "enterprise production deployment."](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [Provide messaging guidance for the QSR launch within one week.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Send an updated competitor list to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Update language page wireframes for new TTS languages.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Follow up with Patricia to secure Sanity CLI admin access.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [Begin keyword research for QSR content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [Cancel the Dec 23 weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/Qb1Gux-kHZP5LgJFBJM6j4xiaJJE_k5V?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
